easyReadonly.title: easy-readonly
easyReadonly.description: Make T readonly. So, make mapped type readonly.
easyReadonly.hint: Mapped type: [K in keyof T]. Set modifiers, such as infer, before brackets.

mediumNonNullable.title: MyNonNullable
mediumNonNullable.description: Write Conditional Type that removes null and undefined from T.
mediumNonNullable.hint: Conditional Type: T extends null | undefined ? never : T

mediumReturntype.title: MyReturnType
mediumReturntype.description: Write a type that extracts the return type of function `T` (infer).
mediumReturntype.hint: infer R allows you to "capture" the type in a conditional expression. It follows the pattern (...:[]) => R

hardReadonlyPartial.title: ReadonlyPartial
hardReadonlyPartial.description: Create a type that makes all properties of object T both readonly and optional.
hardReadonlyPartial.hint: Both modifiers can be applied together: readonly [K in keyof T]?

easyRequired.title: MyRequired
easyRequired.description: Remove optionality from all properties of T. Make every field required.
easyRequired.hint: Use the -? modifier after the mapped key bracket to strip the optional flag: [K in keyof T]-?

easyExclude.title: MyExclude
easyExclude.description: Remove from union type T all members that are assignable to U.
easyExclude.hint: Conditional type: T extends U ? never : T — distribute over each union member.

mediumExtract.title: MyExtract
mediumExtract.description: Construct a type by extracting from T all union members that are assignable to U.
mediumExtract.hint: Opposite of Exclude: T extends U ? T : never

mediumPick.title: MyPick
mediumPick.description: Construct a type by picking a set of properties K from object type T.
mediumPick.hint: Constrain K with `extends keyof T`, then build a mapped type: [P in K]: T[P]

hardOmit.title: MyOmit
hardOmit.description: Construct a type by removing properties K from object type T. Combine mapped types with key remapping.
hardOmit.hint: Use `as` key remapping inside a mapped type to filter keys: [P in keyof T as P extends K ? never : P]

easyMutable.title: Mutable
easyMutable.description: Remove the readonly modifier from all properties of T. The opposite of Readonly.
easyMutable.hint: Use -readonly before the mapped key to strip the readonly modifier: -readonly [K in keyof T]

easyRecord.title: MyRecord
easyRecord.description: Create a type with keys of type K (constrained to string) and values of type V.
easyRecord.hint: Constrain K with `extends string`, then map: [P in K]: V

mediumAwaited.title: MyAwaited
mediumAwaited.description: Extract the type that a Promise resolves to. Unwrap Promise<T> into T.
mediumAwaited.hint: Use conditional type with infer: T extends Promise<infer U> ? U : T

mediumParameters.title: MyParameters
mediumParameters.description: Extract the parameter types of a function type T as a tuple.
mediumParameters.hint: Pattern: T extends (...args: infer P) => any ? P : never

auth.title: Welcome to Tandem
auth.subtitle: Please sign-in or sign-up to start using our App

home.description: Master the tech interview through interactive challenges. Debug the Event Loop, solve TS Investigator mysteries, and win at Code Golf.

nfound.title: Page not found
nfound.body: The page you requested does not exist. You may have entered an invalid address or the page has been removed.

aiExam.descriptionLine2: You have roughly {{maxAllowedAttempts}}-{{oneMoreThanMax}} attempts to give the right answer. Don't waste them. Every message counts.
aiExam.answerLabel: Write your answer to the question:
